content: Devi acquisire al più presto una buona conoscenza dell'inglese commerciale.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by Guybrush88 (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: eng:You have to acquire as soon as possible a good knowledge of business English
eng:You must acquire as soon as possible a good knowledge of business English
fra:Tu dois acquérir au plus vite une bonne connaissance de l'anglais commercial
